title: <div>Below are the two hierarchical to‑do lists.  Each atomic task is separated
content:
Below are the two hierarchical to‑do lists. Each atomic task is separated into its own checkbox and assigned a unique ID (T001, T002, …). The first list preserves the original chronological order (grouped by stages as they appeared). The second list reorganizes the tasks into logical phases while keeping the same IDs so you can cross‑check for completeness.

⸻

Linear Order Version

Preparation and Foundation
• T001 Clarify where your content lives: list all locations for messy data, brainstorms, old drafts, repos, and notes
• T002 Enumerate formats in use: markdown, code files, notes, docs, media, etc.
• T003 Decide your end goals: consolidation, documentation, refined product, or all of the above
• T004 Audit existing repositories to see what you already have
• T005 Design an intake system that can gather files from multiple sources
